title: The Vow
actors: Mikheil Gelovani, A. Mansvetov, Aleksey Gribov
plot: In 1924, veteran Bolshevik Petrov, a resident of Tsaritsyn, carries a letter to Vladimir Lenin, to inform him of the Kulak brigands that roam the land, spreading death and misery. The Kulaks murder him. His widow, Varvara, continu...
